ip_outcome_note: Confirmed via PokemonTCG.io swsh4-40. National Pokedex no. 845 matches. Teal cormorant with Arrokuda wedged in beak is canonical Cramorant Gulping Form design.

trivia_bullets.text: Cramorant appears in Sword & Shield — Vivid Voltage (2020) as no. 040/185, an Uncommon. National Pokedex no. 845, Flying/Water-type, introduced in Generation VIII (Galar).

Gulp Missile is Cramorant's exclusive signature ability. After Surf or Dive: above half HP returns with Arrokuda (Gulping Form, lowers attacker Defense), below half HP returns with Pikachu (Gorging Form, paralyzes attacker). Spits catch when hit.
"Cramorant's gluttony led it to try to swallow an Arrokuda whole, which in turn led to Cramorant getting an Arrokuda stuck in its throat."
Card attack Continuous Gulp Missile (60x damage per Arrokuda discarded from Bench) directly translates the in-game Gulp Missile ability into TCG mechanics, with Arrokuda as literal ammunition.

Community sentiment: Cramorant is broadly considered one of Gen VIII's most meme-friendly designs. The Pikachu-from-mouth Gorging Form image became widely shared official and fan art. Comedy-first design, broadly loved. [Sentiment, not fact — sourced from general community consensus via WebSearch: Pokebeach 2019 reveal]

related_cards.note: Arrokuda evolution, shares oceanic design space
